mapper.insert: insert into activity_plan_content (activity_plan_id, knowledge_goal, emotion_goal, materials, space_requirement, preparation_time, staff_tips, general_warning, special_reminder, created_time, updated_time, created_user, updated_user) values (#{activityPlanId}, #{knowledgeGoal}, #{emotionGoal}, #{materials}, #{spaceRequirement}, #{preparationTime}, #{staffTips}, #{generalWarning}, #{specialReminder}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{createdUser}, #{updatedUser})
